name: Pitchmon
description: A microbe -like Digimon which was discovered in the " Net Ocean ", which had long been studied as the birthplace of life within the Digital World , it has the smallest size among the many Digimon. Since it seems to be living with nothing but emotions, its behavior changes very frequently. Since it is extremely full of curiosity, it greatly wishes to communicate with the outside world, but as yet, no means to do so has been found. However, it is a Digimon Baby that is loved by everyone, due to its big, bright red eyes which are charming enough to shake the opponent's feelings. It spits out soap-like bubbles from its mouth and blinds the opponent's eyes, then flees.
